# WI-QUIC-RFC9000-0017 - QUIC RFC 9000 Non-Ack-Eliciting ACK Deferral And Inclusion Work Item

## Summary

Add direct requirement-home proof and focused trace links for delaying non-ack-eliciting-only ACK emission while retaining those packet numbers for later ACK frame construction.

## Requirements Addressed

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P2P1-0008
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P2P1-0011

## Design Inputs

- ARC-QUIC-RFC9000-0017

## Planned Changes

- Add requirement-home tests proving only non-ack-eliciting packets do not schedule immediate, outgoing, or ACK-only ACK emission.
- Add requirement-home tests proving retained non-ack-eliciting packet numbers are included once a later ack-eliciting event causes ACK frame construction.
- Add deterministic fuzz/property coverage for non-ack-only packet sets and later ack-eliciting events across contiguous and gapped packet numbers.
- Link the paired RFC 9000 Section 13.2.1 non-ack-eliciting ACK deferral and inclusion requirements to a focused architecture, work-item, and verification artifact set while preserving the broad RFC9000-0001 trace.
- Preserve focused verification evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-nonack-deferral-inclusion/`.

## Out of Scope

- ACK frame wire serialization.
- Packet builder frame selection.
- ACK-only feedback-loop policy beyond the scheduling hints proven here.
- Peer loss recovery behavior.
- Congestion-control response.
- Endpoint interop success classification.
- Public API exposure.

## Verification Plan

Run the focused RFC 9000 non-ack-eliciting ACK deferral/inclusion requirement-home tests, render/check the touched SpecTrace artifacts, verify reciprocal trace links for the focused artifact set, run `git diff --check`, and preserve evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-nonack-deferral-inclusion/`.

## Completion Notes

Completed as a direct requirement-home proof over existing ACK-generation state; no production behavior changed.
